armor.name: Padded
armor.desc: Quilted layers of cloth and batting. Provides modest protection but hinders stealth.

armor.name: Leather
armor.desc: Breastplate and shoulder protectors made of stiffened leather.

armor.name: Studded Leather
armor.desc: Leather armor reinforced with close-set rivets or spikes.

armor.name: Hide
armor.desc: Crude armor made from thick furs and animal hides.

armor.name: Chain Shirt
armor.desc: A shirt of interlocking metal rings worn between layers of clothing.

armor.name: Scale Mail
armor.desc: Armor consisting of a coat and leggings of overlapping metal scales.

armor.name: Breastplate
armor.desc: A fitted metal chest piece with a back plate, secured by leather straps.

armor.name: Half Plate
armor.desc: Metal plates covering most of the body except the lower legs.

armor.name: Ring Mail
armor.desc: Leather armor with heavy rings sewn into it to reinforce it.

armor.name: Chain Mail
armor.desc: Armor made of interlocking metal rings, worn over quilted fabric.

armor.name: Splint
armor.desc: Narrow vertical strips of metal rivetted to a backing of leather worn over chainmail.

armor.name: Plate
armor.desc: Full plate armor consisting of shaped, interlocking metal plates covering the entire body.

armor.name: Shield
armor.desc: Adds +2 to AC when wielded. Made of wood or metal, strapped to the forearm.
